summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of KitchenBase foundational skeleton. All 10 user stories validated successfully. The app demonstrates perfect implementation of auth flow, navigation shell, design system, and Spanish-only UI. No bugs found.
passed_tests: US-1: Welcome screen displays Spanish copy with 'Crear cuenta' and 'Iniciar sesión' CTAs, KitchenBase brand mark in Playfair Display
US-3: Login flow with test credentials (kitchenbase.dev.tester@gmail.com) succeeds and routes to Home with 'Inicio' title
US-4: Session persists across full page reload - user stays logged in
US-5: BottomTabBar has 5 Spanish tabs (Despensa, Mis Recetas, Biblioteca, Lista de la Compra, Descubrir) with correct routing and active state styling (terracotta #C2714F)
US-6: TopBar is persistent with KitchenBase logo (routes to /) and settings icon (routes to /settings)
US-7: Settings screen displays user email and 'Cerrar sesión' button; sign-out redirects to /welcome
US-8: All 7 protected routes (/pantry, /my-recipes, /library, /shopping-list, /discover, /settings, /) redirect to /welcome when logged out
US-9: All UI text is in Spanish; no console errors related to Supabase auth or missing env variables
US-10: Mobile-first layout functional at 375-430px viewports; content centered on desktop (1920x1080)
Design system: No drop shadows; terracotta #C2714F for primary actions; Playfair Display for headings; Inter for body text; 8px/12px border radius
